creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
culot       2011-02-13 07:04:22 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/p5-SQL-Tokenizer Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                              pkg-plist 
  Log:
  SQL::Tokenizer is a simple tokenizer for SQL queries. It does not claim
  to be a parser or query verifier. It just creates sane tokens from a
  valid SQL query.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/SQL-Tokenizer
  
  PR:             ports/154706
  Submitted by:   milki <milki AT rescomp.berkeley.edu>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1511    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/textproc/p5-SQL-Tokenizer/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/textproc/p5-SQL-Tokenizer/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/textproc/p5-SQL-Tokenizer/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/textproc/p5-SQL-Tokenizer/pkg-plist (new)
